issue.body:
Spec: docs/specs/2026-05-17-superpowers-gh-workflow-integration-design.md
Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-17-pd-book-tools-strict-linting-rollout.md

Establish basedpyright recommended + ruff + gitlint + pre-commit CI as the canonical strict-lint stack.

nodes.body: All sub-tasks (#79–#86) closed — the canonical strict-linting stack is fully implemented in pd-book-tools (see commit f809701 as the reference implementation).

nodes.description: Design issue with a spec doc
nodes.name: kind:spec

issue.title: Spec: Strict-linting rollout — pd-book-tools canonical pattern
Switch pyright → basedpyright (config + deps; keep `typeCheckingMode = "standard"` initially)
Expand pre-commit hooks (gitleaks, check-*, debug-statements, uv-lock-check, basedpyright local hook)
Expand ruff `select` to the full proposed set + bump ruff pin
Upgrade basedpyright to `recommended` mode + Makefile/CI integration + final `make ci AI=1`

timeline.body: All sub-tasks (#79–#86) closed — the canonical strict-linting stack is fully implemented in pd-book-tools (see commit f809701 as the reference implementation).
